data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'real-time itinerary updates', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. While the scenario describes an itinerary adjustment due to a delay, it does not provide concrete API reads or checks that demonstrate the system's capability to deliver real-time updates to users. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or mechanisms that provide real-time itinerary updates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
